title: 直播界面设计图
prompt: A 9:16 aspect ratio image, generating a screenshot of a Douyin livestream where {argument name="celebrity" default="Liu Yifei"} is broadcasting, holding a sign that says "{argument name="sign text" default="Streaming tonight, welcome to join Yifei's chat!"}"
